def positive_pickle_deserialization_boundary():
    rule_id = "pickle_deserialization_boundary"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "pickle.load(s) or dill.load(s) style deserialization in production code."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
